violations.text: The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2024

Dates packaged in the food establishment are lacking complete labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings in boxes of food, on market shelves, and on the shelves & floor at the checkout counter. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Big Blue Bug PCS monthly. Pest control must be increased to 2x/week until rodent issue is under control. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2024
Food observed stored on the floor in the market and back area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of some market shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, rodent droppings, spilled food, and other debris. The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigerators have an accumulation of dirt and debris. Chest freezers have an accumulation of frost and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2024
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2024

The floors throughout the facility including the basement storage area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed throughout the establishment. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2024
